content: MoonBit modules are publication units. moon.mod.json deps maps exact module names to semantic versions; moon add manages it; moon uses minimal version selection. For publication, names must begin with the authenticated username/owner namespace and versions follow SemVer. Clean consumers should omit moon.work/path dependencies, run moon update, add or declare exact published versions, then check/test all four supported targets. Publish mb-core before mb-color, then mb-image because the manifests form that dependency DAG.
